notes: Rows 0-7 of tficons_limited_16 are almost entirely UI/system iconography (HUD glyphs, dialog bubbles, file/settings icons, cursor hands, chevrons, weather). Only a handful of cells (1,0 heart; 5,0 flask; 6,0 skull; 7,0 sword; 8,0 shield; 9,0 backpack; 10-13,0 coins) read as usable game-item art, and even those are HUD-styled. 128 cells inspected, 1 empty (0,0), 127 catalogued.

cells.name: red_heart
cells.notes: filled red heart with highlight — HP pip

cells.name: empty_heart
cells.notes: dark slate silhouette of the same heart — empty HP pip

cells.notes: filled cyan/blue five-point star

cells.notes: dark slate silhouette of the star

cells.notes: pale skull with dark eye sockets — death/danger glyph
